calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Jordan Lavinsky, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bedemco, Inc.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Valley Sun Products of California, Inc. as follows:
Damages $77,152.28
Prejudgment Interest $10,286.93
Attorney's Fees $6,000.00
Costs $819.55, for a total of $94,258.76
Judgment signed in open court.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
No appearance stated.

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff BEDEMCO, INC.'s Application For Writ of Attachment is granted in the amount of $163,264.56. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
